name: Tee Times Bloomfield
about: Tee Times is an indoor golf simulator venue with locations in Rochester Hills and Bloomfield Township, Michigan. The facility utilizes 12 Golfzon TwoVision Plus simulators, offering a realistic playing experience with access to over 200 courses. Tee Times provides a full-service bar and kitchen, making it suitable for both individual practice sessions and group events. Pricing is based on hourly bay rental and varies depending on the day and time.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge Golfzon TwoVision Plus simulator technology for accurate and immersive play
Multiple hitting surfaces (fairway, rough, bunker) to replicate on-course conditions
Full-service bar and kitchen available for food and drinks during play
Ability to play over 200 championship courses from around the world

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual high-speed cameras, 24-position swing plate, multi-surface mats

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted as Tee Times has its own full-service kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes can vary, but a typical round takes approximately 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Times is suitable for families and offers a versatile environment that can accommodate children, including hosting family gatherings and birthday parties.
